dates.source_text: WHEREAS, in connection with the Series A Financing and the transactions contemplated by the Purchase Agreement, the Corporation proposes to (i) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Investors’ Rights Agreement, dated April 27, 2023 (the “IRA”), substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit C (the “Amended IRA”), (ii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Right of First Refusal and Co-Sale Agreement, dated April 7, 2025, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit D (the “Amended ROFR Agreement”), (iii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Voting Agreeme...

WHEREAS, in connection with the Series A Financing and the transactions contemplated by the Purchase Agreement, the Corporation proposes to (i) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Investors’ Rights Agreement, dated April 27, 2023 (the “IRA”), substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit C (the “Amended IRA”), (ii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Right of First Refusal and Co-Sale Agreement, dated April 7, 2025, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit D (the “Amended ROFR Agreement”), (iii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Voting Agreeme...

WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 1 of those certain simple agreements for future equity that the Corporation entered into between November 16, 2024 and April 12, 2025 (the “SAFEs”), upon the occurrence of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs), the SAFEs shall be converted into the preferred stock of the Corporation issued in the Equity Financing having identical rights, privileges, preferences and restrictions as such preferred stock; and

WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 1 of those certain simple agreements for future equity that the Corporation entered into between November 16, 2024 and April 12, 2025 (the “SAFEs”), upon the occurrence of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs), the SAFEs shall be converted into the preferred stock of the Corporation issued in the Equity Financing having identical rights, privileges, preferences and restrictions as such preferred stock; and

WHEREAS, the Board previously approved the sale and issuance of shares of Series Seed Preferred Stock of the Corporation, [●] (the “Series Seed Shares), pursuant to that certain Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, dated as of ·, 2025 (the “Series Seed Purchase Agreement);

WHEREAS, on April 3, 2025, the Board approved and authorized the issuance by the Corporation of up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock (such shares, the “NQ Shares”) to NQ Clinic (“NQ”) (or its affiliate), pursuant to a Subscription Agreement with NQ and to that certain Know-How License Agreement with NQ Foundation for Medical Education and Research (collectively, the “NQ Agreement”), as partial consideration for the rights granted thereunder, and upon satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth therein.

WHEREAS, the Board believes it to be in the best interests of the Corporation to amend the Plan in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit H-1 to reserve an additional 191,005 shares of Common Stock and increase the total number of authorized shares of Common Stock issuable under the Plan to 1,579,894 (the “Initial Plan Amendment”) immediately prior to the Initial Closing (as defined in the Purchase Agreement) and to further amend the Plan in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit H-2 to reserve an additional 397,074 shares of Common Stock and increase the total number...

WHEREAS, the Series A Financing will satisfy the conditions of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs) and therefore, at the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing the SAFEs will automatically convert into shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock.

RESOLVED, that the Board approves the issuance of shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock as required pursuant to the terms of the SAFEs, and confirms that the Series A Financing constitutes an Equity Financing pursuant to the SAFEs.

WHEREAS, on April 3, 2025, the Board approved and authorized the issuance by the Corporation of up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock (such shares, the “NQ Shares”) to NQ Clinic (“NQ”) (or its affiliate), pursuant to a Subscription Agreement with NQ and to that certain Know-How License Agreement with NQ Foundation for Medical Education and Research (collectively, the “NQ Agreement”), as partial consideration for the rights granted thereunder, and upon satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth therein.
WHEREAS, the Corporation is issuing shares of Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing and is issuing up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock pursuant to the NQ Agreement;

W, a director of the Corporation, is the founding partner of E Capital Fund II L.P., which has the right to purchase shares of Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing, and which is a party to a simple agreement for future equity with the Corporation that will convert into shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock in connection with the Series A Financing.

metadata.text: Pursuant to the provisions of Section 141(f), 242 and 245 of the Delaware General Corporation Law (the “DGCL”), the undersigned, being all of the members of the Board of Directors (the “Board”) of A Inc., a Delaware corporation (the “Corporation”), hereby adopt the following resolutions by written consent in lieu of a meeting, effective as of the date first set forth above (the “Effective Date”).
Restated Certificate of Incorporation

WHEREAS, in connection with the Series A Financing (as defined below), the Board deems it to be in the best interests of the Corporation and the stockholders of the Corporation (the “Stockholders”) to amend and restate the Second Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation of the Corporation.

Resolved, that the Second Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation of the Corporation, subject to approval by the Stockholders, be amended and restated to read in its entirety in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit A (the “Restated Certificate”), which will, among other things (i) increase the number of authorized shares of common stock of the Corporation, $0.0001 par value per share (the “Common Stock”) to 20,846,398 shares, (ii) increase the number of authorized shares of preferred stock of the Corporation to 12,534,151 shares, (iii) designate a class of Series A-1 Preferred Stock of the Corporation, $0.0001 par value per share (the “Series A-1 Preferred Stock”), (iv) designate a class of Series A-2 Preferred Stock of the Corporation, $0.0001 par value per share (the “Series A-2 Preferred Stock”), (v) designate a class of Series A-3 Preferred Stock of the Corporation, $0.0001 par value per share (the “Series A-3 Preferred Stock” and, collectively with the Series A-1 Preferred Stock and the Series A-2 Preferred Stock, the “Series A Preferred Stock”), (vi) authorize the shares of Series A Preferred Stock available for issuance thereunder, and (vii) set forth the rights, privileges and preferences of the Series A Preferred Stock.
FURTHER Resolved, that the Board recommends that the Stockholders approve and adopt the Restated Certificate.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, in the name and on behalf of the Corporation, to take all action deemed necessary or appropriate to solicit the consent of the Stockholders with respect to the foregoing Restated Certificate, and that any and all such actions that may have been taken to date are hereby authorized, ratified, approved and confirmed in all respects.

further resolved, that, upon receipt of the Stockholders’ consent, the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to make such filings with the Secretary of State of the State of Delaware as may be deemed necessary or appropriate with respect to the Restated Certificate.
Series A Preferred Stock Financing and Transaction Documents

WHEREAS, the Board deems it to be in the best interests of the Corporation and the Stockholders to issue and sell (the “Series A Financing”) (i) up to 1,551,865 shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-1 Shares”) at a purchase price of $1.6754 per share with respect to the conversion of the SAFEs (as defined below), (ii) up to 4,297,582 shares of Series A-2 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-2 Shares”) at the purchase price of $2.0942 per share, and (iii) up to 3,906,926 shares of Series A-3 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-3 Shares” and, collectively with the Series A-1 Shares and the Series A-2 Shares, the “Shares”) at a purchase price of $2.3036 per share, pursuant to the terms and conditions set forth in the Series A Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit B (the “Purchase Agreement”); and

WHEREAS, in connection with the Series A Financing and the transactions contemplated by the Purchase Agreement, the Corporation proposes to (i) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Investors’ Rights Agreement, dated April 27, 2023 (the “IRA”), substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit C (the “Amended IRA”), (ii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Right of First Refusal and Co-Sale Agreement, dated April 7, 2025, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit D (the “Amended ROFR Agreement”), (iii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Voting Agreement, dated April 27, 2023, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit E (the “Amended Voting Agreement”), (iv) enter into certain Management Rights Letters, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit F (the “MRLs”), and (v) enter into Indemnification Agreements, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit G (the “Indemnification Agreements” and, together with the Purchase Agreement, the Amended IRA, the Amended ROFR Agreement, the Amended Voting Agreement and the MRLs, the “Transaction Documents”).
RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves the Series A Financing and the form, terms and provisions of the Transaction Documents.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Shares shall be uncertificated.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized in the name of and on behalf of the Corporation to execute and deliver the Transaction Documents and such other agreements and documents as such officers deem necessary and advisable in connection with the Series A Financing, the execution and delivery thereof to conclusively evidence approval by the Board.

further resolved, that the Shares issuable pursuant to the terms and conditions of the Purchase Agreement be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance pursuant to the terms of the Purchase Agreement, and that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to sell and issue the Shares for the consideration provided for in the Purchase Agreement and otherwise upon the terms and conditions described therein.

further resolved, that the issuance and delivery of the shares of Common Stock, issuable upon conversion of the Shares is hereby authorized and approved in all respects and that such shares of Common Stock (and any additional shares of Common Stock issuable upon conversion of any shares of Series A Preferred Stock issued upon operation of any anti-dilution or other adjustment provisions provided for under the Restated Certificate) be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance upon the conversion of the Shares.

further resolved, that when the consideration provided for in the Purchase Agreement has been received by the Corporation, the Shares purchased (or portion of the Shares purchased, as the case may be) shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable, and the shares of Common Stock issuable upon conversion of the Shares, when issued upon conversion of the Shares as provided for in the Restated Certificate, shall be duly and validly issued, fully paid and nonassessable.

further resolved, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to execute and deliver one or more certificates for the Shares upon purchase thereof, and any shares of Common Stock issued upon conversion of the Shares, in such form as may be approved by such officer.

WHEREAS, the Board seeks to facilitate the Corporation’s ability to retain skilled personnel through the grant of equity incentive awards and desires to increase the number of shares reserved for issuance pursuant to the 2023 Equity Incentive Plan of the Corporation (the “Plan”); and

WHEREAS, the Board believes it to be in the best interests of the Corporation to amend the Plan in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit H-1 to reserve an additional 191,005 shares of Common Stock and increase the total number of authorized shares of Common Stock issuable under the Plan to 1,579,894 (the “Initial Plan Amendment”) immediately prior to the Initial Closing (as defined in the Purchase Agreement) and to further amend the Plan in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit H-2 to reserve an additional 397,074 shares of Common Stock and increase the total number of authorized shares of Common Stock issuable under the Plan to 1,976,969immediately subsequent to the Tranche 1 Closing; to the extent that the amount purchased by the Purchasers at the Tranche 1 Closing is less than the amounts required to be purchased pursuant to Exhibit B-2 of the Purchase Agreement (the “Shortfall Shares”), the aforementioned 397,074 Stock Plan reserve increase shall be reduced by a percentage equal to the Shortfall Shares divided by the sum of the Fully Diluted Common Stock and the Shortfall Shares. For example, if Fully Diluted Common Stock is 18,853,713 and the Shortfall Share total is equal to 1,000,000 then the percentage shall equal 1,000,000/19,853,713, or 5.0368%, which would reduce the additional share reserve amount from 397,074 to 377,074 (the “Tranche 1 Plan Amendment” and together with the Initial Plan Amendment, the “Plan Amendments”).

RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves and adopts the Plan Amendments, the Initial Plan Amendment shall become effective immediately as of the date hereof, and the Tranche 1 Plan Amendment shall become effective immediately subsequent to the Tranche 1 Closing.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves and adopts the Plan Amendments and recommends that the Plan Amendments be presented to the Stockholders for their approval.
Board of Directors

RESOLVED, that, effective upon the Initial Closing (as defined in the Purchase Agreement), the number of members of the Board is hereby increased to five (5), and the Board will consist of the following: A, P, Q, W and R.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that Q will continue to serve as a director and will be the “Series Seed Preferred Director” as that term is defined in the Restated Certificate.
Conversion and Termination of SAFEs

WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 1 of those certain simple agreements for future equity that the Corporation entered into between November 16, 2024 and April 12, 2025 (the “SAFEs”), upon the occurrence of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs), the SAFEs shall be converted into the preferred stock of the Corporation issued in the Equity Financing having identical rights, privileges, preferences and restrictions as such preferred stock; and

WHEREAS, the Series A Financing will satisfy the conditions of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs) and therefore, at the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing the SAFEs will automatically convert into shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock.

RESOLVED, that the Board approves the issuance of shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock as required pursuant to the terms of the SAFEs, and confirms that the Series A Financing constitutes an Equity Financing pursuant to the SAFEs.
Amendment No. 1 to Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement

WHEREAS, the Board previously approved the sale and issuance of shares of Series Seed Preferred Stock of the Corporation, [●] (the “Series Seed Shares), pursuant to that certain Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, dated as of ·, 2025 (the “Series Seed Purchase Agreement);

WHEREAS, the Corporation and the holders of no less than a majority of the outstanding Series Seed Shares desire to amend the Series Seed Purchase Agreement as set forth in the Amendment No. 1 to Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit I (the “Series Seed SPA Amendment”).
RESOLVED that the form, terms and provisions of the Series Seed SPA Amendment be, and they hereby are confirmed, ratified and approved in all respects; and
Issuance of NQ Shares

WHEREAS, on April 3, 2025, the Board approved and authorized the issuance by the Corporation of up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock (such shares, the “NQ Shares”) to NQ Clinic (“NQ”) (or its affiliate), pursuant to a Subscription Agreement with NQ and to that certain Know-How License Agreement with NQ Foundation for Medical Education and Research (collectively, the “NQ Agreement”), as partial consideration for the rights granted thereunder, and upon satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth therein.

RESOLVED, that the NQ Shares issuable pursuant to the terms and conditions of the NQ Agreement be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance pursuant to the terms of the NQ Agreement, and that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to issue the NQ Shares for the consideration provided for in the NQ Agreement and otherwise upon the terms and conditions described therein and herein.

further resolved, that upon the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing, 100,000 NQ Shares shall be issued to NQ, and such May Shares shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable upon such issuance.

further resolved, that upon issuance in accordance with the terms of the NQ Agreement upon the satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth in the NQ Agreement, the remaining 200,000 NQ Shares shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable.

further resolved, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to execute and deliver one or more certificates for the NQ Shares in such form as may be approved by such officer.
Waiver of Preemptive Rights
WHEREAS, the Corporation is issuing shares of Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing and is issuing up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock pursuant to the NQ Agreement;

WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 4 of the IRA, certain of the Corporation’s stockholders have the right to purchase a portion of the Series A Preferred Stock being sold in the Series A Financing and a portion of the NQ Shares (the “Preemptive Rights”); and
WHEREAS, the Corporation and the Stockholders will materially benefit from the Series A Financing and the NQ Agreement and the Corporation accordingly desires to waive the Preemptive Rights.

RESOLVED, the Corporation hereby consents to the waiver by the Stockholders of the Preemptive Rights that arise solely out of or relate to the issuance of the Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing, and any shares of Common Stock issuable upon conversion of the Series A Preferred Stock, and of the NQ Shares, including the waiver of the related requirement for the delivery of notice of the Series A Financing and the issuance of the NQ Shares or the entrance into the NQ Agreement and any related notice or exercise period.
Interested Director Transaction

Whereas, pursuant to Section 144 of the DGCL, no contract or transaction between the Corporation and any other corporation, partnership, association or other organization in which one or more of the officers or directors of the Corporation is an officer or director of, or has a financial interest in (any such contract or transaction is referred to herein as an “Interested Party Transaction”), shall be void or voidable solely for that reason, or solely because the director or officer is present at or participates in the meeting of the board of directors that authorized the Interested Party Transaction or solely because the vote of any such director is counted for such purpose, if: (i) the material facts as to the relationship or interest and as to the contract are disclosed or are known to the board of directors, and the board of directors in good faith authorizes the contract or transaction by affirmative votes of a majority of the disinterested directors, even though the disinterested directors be less than a quorum, (ii) the material facts as to the relationship or interest and as to the contract are disclosed or are known to the stockholders entitled to vote thereon, and the contract or transaction is specifically approved in good faith by vote of the stockholders, or (iii) the contract or transaction is fair as to the Corporation as of the time it is authorized, approved or ratified by the board of directors or the stockholders; and
Whereas, it is hereby disclosed or made known to the Board that:

W, a director of the Corporation, is the founding partner of E Capital Fund II L.P., which has the right to purchase shares of Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing, and which is a party to a simple agreement for future equity with the Corporation that will convert into shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock in connection with the Series A Financing.
RESOLVED, that the transactions set forth above are hereby approved by the Board (including all directors other than the interested director set forth above).
EXHIBIT B
SERIES A PREFERRED STOCK PURCHASE AGREEMENT
[See attached.]
EXHIBIT D
AMENDED ROFR AGREEMENT
[See attached.]
EXHIBIT E
AMENDED VOTING AGREEMENT
[See attached.]
EXHIBIT G
INDEMNIFICATION AGREEMENTS
[See attached.]

dates.text: OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS

Pursuant to the provisions of Section 141(f), 242 and 245 of the Delaware General Corporation Law (the “DGCL”), the undersigned, being all of the members of the Board of Directors (the “Board”) of A Inc., a Delaware corporation (the “Corporation”), hereby adopt the following resolutions by written consent in lieu of a meeting, effective as of the date first set forth above (the “Effective Date”).
Restated Certificate of Incorporation
FURTHER Resolved, that the Board recommends that the Stockholders approve and adopt the Restated Certificate.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, in the name and on behalf of the Corporation, to take all action deemed necessary or appropriate to solicit the consent of the Stockholders with respect to the foregoing Restated Certificate, and that any and all such actions that may have been taken to date are hereby authorized, ratified, approved and confirmed in all respects.

further resolved, that, upon receipt of the Stockholders’ consent, the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to make such filings with the Secretary of State of the State of Delaware as may be deemed necessary or appropriate with respect to the Restated Certificate.

WHEREAS, the Board deems it to be in the best interests of the Corporation and the Stockholders to issue and sell (the “Series A Financing”) (i) up to 1,551,865 shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-1 Shares”) at a purchase price of $1.6754 per share with respect to the conversion of the SAFEs (as defined below), (ii) up to 4,297,582 shares of Series A-2 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-2 Shares”) at the purchase price of $2.0942 per share, and (iii) up to 3,906,926 shares of Series A-3 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-3 Shares” and, collectively with the Series A-1 Shares and the Series A-2 Shares, the “Shares”) at a purchase price of $2.3036 per share, pursuant to the terms and conditions set forth in the Series A Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit B (the “Purchase Agreement”); and

WHEREAS, in connection with the Series A Financing and the transactions contemplated by the Purchase Agreement, the Corporation proposes to (i) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Investors’ Rights Agreement, dated April 27, 2023 (the “IRA”), substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit C (the “Amended IRA”), (ii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Right of First Refusal and Co-Sale Agreement, dated April 7, 2025, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit D (the “Amended ROFR Agreement”), (iii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Voting Agreement, dated April 27, 2023, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit E (the “Amended Voting Agreement”), (iv) enter into certain Management Rights Letters, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit F (the “MRLs”), and (v) enter into Indemnification Agreements, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit G (the “Indemnification Agreements” and, together with the Purchase Agreement, the Amended IRA, the Amended ROFR Agreement, the Amended Voting Agreement and the MRLs, the “Transaction Documents”).
RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves the Series A Financing and the form, terms and provisions of the Transaction Documents.

WHEREAS, the Board seeks to facilitate the Corporation’s ability to retain skilled personnel through the grant of equity incentive awards and desires to increase the number of shares reserved for issuance pursuant to the 2023 Equity Incentive Plan of the Corporation (the “Plan”); and

WHEREAS, the Board believes it to be in the best interests of the Corporation to amend the Plan in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit H-1 to reserve an additional 191,005 shares of Common Stock and increase the total number of authorized shares of Common Stock issuable under the Plan to 1,579,894 (the “Initial Plan Amendment”) immediately prior to the Initial Closing (as defined in the Purchase Agreement) and to further amend the Plan in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit H-2 to reserve an additional 397,074 shares of Common Stock and increase the total number of authorized shares of Common Stock issuable under the Plan to 1,976,969immediately subsequent to the Tranche 1 Closing; to the extent that the amount purchased by the Purchasers at the Tranche 1 Closing is less than the amounts required to be purchased pursuant to Exhibit B-2 of the Purchase Agreement (the “Shortfall Shares”), the aforementioned 397,074 Stock Plan reserve increase shall be reduced by a percentage equal to the Shortfall Shares divided by the sum of the Fully Diluted Common Stock and the Shortfall Shares. For example, if Fully Diluted Common Stock is 18,853,713 and the Shortfall Share total is equal to 1,000,000 then the percentage shall equal 1,000,000/19,853,713, or 5.0368%, which would reduce the additional share reserve amount from 397,074 to 377,074 (the “Tranche 1 Plan Amendment” and together with the Initial Plan Amendment, the “Plan Amendments”).

RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves and adopts the Plan Amendments, the Initial Plan Amendment shall become effective immediately as of the date hereof, and the Tranche 1 Plan Amendment shall become effective immediately subsequent to the Tranche 1 Closing.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves and adopts the Plan Amendments and recommends that the Plan Amendments be presented to the Stockholders for their approval.
Board of Directors

RESOLVED, that, effective upon the Initial Closing (as defined in the Purchase Agreement), the number of members of the Board is hereby increased to five (5), and the Board will consist of the following: A, P, Q, W and R.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that Q will continue to serve as a director and will be the “Series Seed Preferred Director” as that term is defined in the Restated Certificate.

WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 1 of those certain simple agreements for future equity that the Corporation entered into between November 16, 2024 and April 12, 2025 (the “SAFEs”), upon the occurrence of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs), the SAFEs shall be converted into the preferred stock of the Corporation issued in the Equity Financing having identical rights, privileges, preferences and restrictions as such preferred stock; and

WHEREAS, the Series A Financing will satisfy the conditions of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs) and therefore, at the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing the SAFEs will automatically convert into shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock.

RESOLVED, that the Board approves the issuance of shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock as required pursuant to the terms of the SAFEs, and confirms that the Series A Financing constitutes an Equity Financing pursuant to the SAFEs.
Amendment No. 1 to Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement

WHEREAS, the Board previously approved the sale and issuance of shares of Series Seed Preferred Stock of the Corporation, [●] (the “Series Seed Shares), pursuant to that certain Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, dated as of ·, 2025 (the “Series Seed Purchase Agreement);

WHEREAS, the Corporation and the holders of no less than a majority of the outstanding Series Seed Shares desire to amend the Series Seed Purchase Agreement as set forth in the Amendment No. 1 to Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit I (the “Series Seed SPA Amendment”).
Issuance of NQ Shares

WHEREAS, on April 3, 2025, the Board approved and authorized the issuance by the Corporation of up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock (such shares, the “NQ Shares”) to NQ Clinic (“NQ”) (or its affiliate), pursuant to a Subscription Agreement with NQ and to that certain Know-How License Agreement with NQ Foundation for Medical Education and Research (collectively, the “NQ Agreement”), as partial consideration for the rights granted thereunder, and upon satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth therein.

RESOLVED, that the NQ Shares issuable pursuant to the terms and conditions of the NQ Agreement be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance pursuant to the terms of the NQ Agreement, and that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to issue the NQ Shares for the consideration provided for in the NQ Agreement and otherwise upon the terms and conditions described therein and herein.

further resolved, that upon the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing, 100,000 NQ Shares shall be issued to NQ, and such May Shares shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable upon such issuance.

further resolved, that upon issuance in accordance with the terms of the NQ Agreement upon the satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth in the NQ Agreement, the remaining 200,000 NQ Shares shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable.

further resolved, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to execute and deliver one or more certificates for the NQ Shares in such form as may be approved by such officer.
[Signature page follow.]
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the undersigned, being all of the members of the Board of Directors of the Corporation, have executed this Action by Written Consent as of the Effective Date.
BOARD OF DIRECTORS:
EXHIBIT H-2
TRANCHE 1 PLAN AMENDMENT
[See attached.]

financing.text: Restated Certificate of Incorporation

WHEREAS, in connection with the Series A Financing (as defined below), the Board deems it to be in the best interests of the Corporation and the stockholders of the Corporation (the “Stockholders”) to amend and restate the Second Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation of the Corporation.

Resolved, that the Second Amended and Restated Certificate of Incorporation of the Corporation, subject to approval by the Stockholders, be amended and restated to read in its entirety in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit A (the “Restated Certificate”), which will, among other things (i) increase the number of authorized shares of common stock of the Corporation, $0.0001 par value per share (the “Common Stock”) to 20,846,398 shares, (ii) increase the number of authorized shares of preferred stock of the Corporation to 12,534,151 shares, (iii) designate a class of Series A-1 Preferred Stock of the Corporation, $0.0001 par value per share (the “Series A-1 Preferred Stock”), (iv) designate a class of Series A-2 Preferred Stock of the Corporation, $0.0001 par value per share (the “Series A-2 Preferred Stock”), (v) designate a class of Series A-3 Preferred Stock of the Corporation, $0.0001 par value per share (the “Series A-3 Preferred Stock” and, collectively with the Series A-1 Preferred Stock and the Series A-2 Preferred Stock, the “Series A Preferred Stock”), (vi) authorize the shares of Series A Preferred Stock available for issuance thereunder, and (vii) set forth the rights, privileges and preferences of the Series A Preferred Stock.
FURTHER Resolved, that the Board recommends that the Stockholders approve and adopt the Restated Certificate.

further resolved, that, upon receipt of the Stockholders’ consent, the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to make such filings with the Secretary of State of the State of Delaware as may be deemed necessary or appropriate with respect to the Restated Certificate.
Series A Preferred Stock Financing and Transaction Documents

WHEREAS, the Board deems it to be in the best interests of the Corporation and the Stockholders to issue and sell (the “Series A Financing”) (i) up to 1,551,865 shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-1 Shares”) at a purchase price of $1.6754 per share with respect to the conversion of the SAFEs (as defined below), (ii) up to 4,297,582 shares of Series A-2 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-2 Shares”) at the purchase price of $2.0942 per share, and (iii) up to 3,906,926 shares of Series A-3 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-3 Shares” and, collectively with the Series A-1 Shares and the Series A-2 Shares, the “Shares”) at a purchase price of $2.3036 per share, pursuant to the terms and conditions set forth in the Series A Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit B (the “Purchase Agreement”); and

WHEREAS, in connection with the Series A Financing and the transactions contemplated by the Purchase Agreement, the Corporation proposes to (i) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Investors’ Rights Agreement, dated April 27, 2023 (the “IRA”), substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit C (the “Amended IRA”), (ii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Right of First Refusal and Co-Sale Agreement, dated April 7, 2025, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit D (the “Amended ROFR Agreement”), (iii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Voting Agreement, dated April 27, 2023, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit E (the “Amended Voting Agreement”), (iv) enter into certain Management Rights Letters, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit F (the “MRLs”), and (v) enter into Indemnification Agreements, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit G (the “Indemnification Agreements” and, together with the Purchase Agreement, the Amended IRA, the Amended ROFR Agreement, the Amended Voting Agreement and the MRLs, the “Transaction Documents”).
RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves the Series A Financing and the form, terms and provisions of the Transaction Documents.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Shares shall be uncertificated.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized in the name of and on behalf of the Corporation to execute and deliver the Transaction Documents and such other agreements and documents as such officers deem necessary and advisable in connection with the Series A Financing, the execution and delivery thereof to conclusively evidence approval by the Board.

further resolved, that the Shares issuable pursuant to the terms and conditions of the Purchase Agreement be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance pursuant to the terms of the Purchase Agreement, and that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to sell and issue the Shares for the consideration provided for in the Purchase Agreement and otherwise upon the terms and conditions described therein.

further resolved, that the issuance and delivery of the shares of Common Stock, issuable upon conversion of the Shares is hereby authorized and approved in all respects and that such shares of Common Stock (and any additional shares of Common Stock issuable upon conversion of any shares of Series A Preferred Stock issued upon operation of any anti-dilution or other adjustment provisions provided for under the Restated Certificate) be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance upon the conversion of the Shares.

further resolved, that when the consideration provided for in the Purchase Agreement has been received by the Corporation, the Shares purchased (or portion of the Shares purchased, as the case may be) shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable, and the shares of Common Stock issuable upon conversion of the Shares, when issued upon conversion of the Shares as provided for in the Restated Certificate, shall be duly and validly issued, fully paid and nonassessable.

further resolved, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to execute and deliver one or more certificates for the Shares upon purchase thereof, and any shares of Common Stock issued upon conversion of the Shares, in such form as may be approved by such officer.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized in the name of, and on behalf of, the Corporation to take all other lawful actions that they may deem necessary or advisable in order to consummate the transactions contemplated by the Transaction Documents and otherwise to effect the intent of the foregoing resolutions.
Equity Incentive Plan Amendment

WHEREAS, the Board seeks to facilitate the Corporation’s ability to retain skilled personnel through the grant of equity incentive awards and desires to increase the number of shares reserved for issuance pursuant to the 2023 Equity Incentive Plan of the Corporation (the “Plan”); and

WHEREAS, the Board believes it to be in the best interests of the Corporation to amend the Plan in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit H-1 to reserve an additional 191,005 shares of Common Stock and increase the total number of authorized shares of Common Stock issuable under the Plan to 1,579,894 (the “Initial Plan Amendment”) immediately prior to the Initial Closing (as defined in the Purchase Agreement) and to further amend the Plan in substantially the form attached hereto as Exhibit H-2 to reserve an additional 397,074 shares of Common Stock and increase the total number of authorized shares of Common Stock issuable under the Plan to 1,976,969immediately subsequent to the Tranche 1 Closing; to the extent that the amount purchased by the Purchasers at the Tranche 1 Closing is less than the amounts required to be purchased pursuant to Exhibit B-2 of the Purchase Agreement (the “Shortfall Shares”), the aforementioned 397,074 Stock Plan reserve increase shall be reduced by a percentage equal to the Shortfall Shares divided by the sum of the Fully Diluted Common Stock and the Shortfall Shares. For example, if Fully Diluted Common Stock is 18,853,713 and the Shortfall Share total is equal to 1,000,000 then the percentage shall equal 1,000,000/19,853,713, or 5.0368%, which would reduce the additional share reserve amount from 397,074 to 377,074 (the “Tranche 1 Plan Amendment” and together with the Initial Plan Amendment, the “Plan Amendments”).

RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves and adopts the Plan Amendments, the Initial Plan Amendment shall become effective immediately as of the date hereof, and the Tranche 1 Plan Amendment shall become effective immediately subsequent to the Tranche 1 Closing.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that the Board hereby approves and adopts the Plan Amendments and recommends that the Plan Amendments be presented to the Stockholders for their approval.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that Q will continue to serve as a director and will be the “Series Seed Preferred Director” as that term is defined in the Restated Certificate.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that W and R will be the “Series A Preferred Directors” as that term is defined in the Restated Certificate.
Conversion and Termination of SAFEs

WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 1 of those certain simple agreements for future equity that the Corporation entered into between November 16, 2024 and April 12, 2025 (the “SAFEs”), upon the occurrence of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs), the SAFEs shall be converted into the preferred stock of the Corporation issued in the Equity Financing having identical rights, privileges, preferences and restrictions as such preferred stock; and

WHEREAS, the Series A Financing will satisfy the conditions of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs) and therefore, at the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing the SAFEs will automatically convert into shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock.

RESOLVED, that the Board approves the issuance of shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock as required pursuant to the terms of the SAFEs, and confirms that the Series A Financing constitutes an Equity Financing pursuant to the SAFEs.
Amendment No. 1 to Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement

WHEREAS, the Board previously approved the sale and issuance of shares of Series Seed Preferred Stock of the Corporation, [●] (the “Series Seed Shares), pursuant to that certain Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, dated as of ·, 2025 (the “Series Seed Purchase Agreement);

WHEREAS, the Corporation and the holders of no less than a majority of the outstanding Series Seed Shares desire to amend the Series Seed Purchase Agreement as set forth in the Amendment No. 1 to Series Seed Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit I (the “Series Seed SPA Amendment”).
RESOLVED that the form, terms and provisions of the Series Seed SPA Amendment be, and they hereby are confirmed, ratified and approved in all respects; and

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation be, and each of them hereby is, authorized in the name and on behalf of the Corporation to take all other lawful actions that they may deem necessary or advisable in order to consummate the transactions contemplated by the Series Seed SPA Amendment and otherwise to effect the intent of the foregoing resolutions.
Issuance of NQ Shares

WHEREAS, on April 3, 2025, the Board approved and authorized the issuance by the Corporation of up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock (such shares, the “NQ Shares”) to NQ Clinic (“NQ”) (or its affiliate), pursuant to a Subscription Agreement with NQ and to that certain Know-How License Agreement with NQ Foundation for Medical Education and Research (collectively, the “NQ Agreement”), as partial consideration for the rights granted thereunder, and upon satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth therein.

RESOLVED, that the NQ Shares issuable pursuant to the terms and conditions of the NQ Agreement be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance pursuant to the terms of the NQ Agreement, and that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to issue the NQ Shares for the consideration provided for in the NQ Agreement and otherwise upon the terms and conditions described therein and herein.

further resolved, that upon the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing, 100,000 NQ Shares shall be issued to NQ, and such May Shares shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable upon such issuance.

further resolved, that upon issuance in accordance with the terms of the NQ Agreement upon the satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth in the NQ Agreement, the remaining 200,000 NQ Shares shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable.

further resolved, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to execute and deliver one or more certificates for the NQ Shares in such form as may be approved by such officer.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized in the name of, and on behalf of, the Corporation to take all other lawful actions that they may deem necessary or advisable in order to effect the intent of the foregoing resolutions.
Exemptions from Registration

RESOLVED, that in connection with the Series A Financing, the Corporation is authorized to prepare and file with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (the “SEC”), such documents as any of the Corporation’s officers, on the advice of legal counsel, deem appropriate in order to comply with the requirements for a transaction that is exempt from registration with the SEC.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that it is desirable and in the best interests of the Corporation that its securities be exempt from registration in various states; that the Corporation’s officers are hereby authorized to determine the states in which appropriate action shall be taken to exempt the securities of the Corporation as such officers, or any of them individually, may deem advisable; that said officers are hereby authorized to perform on behalf of the Corporation any and all such acts as they deem necessary or advisable in order to comply with the applicable laws of any such states, and in connection therewith to execute and file all requisite papers and documents; and the execution by such officers of any such paper or document or the doing by them of any act in connection with the foregoing matters shall conclusively establish their authority from the Corporation and the approval and ratification by the Corporation of the papers and documents so executed and the action so taken.
Waiver of Preemptive Rights
WHEREAS, the Corporation is issuing shares of Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing and is issuing up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock pursuant to the NQ Agreement;

WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 4 of the IRA, certain of the Corporation’s stockholders have the right to purchase a portion of the Series A Preferred Stock being sold in the Series A Financing and a portion of the NQ Shares (the “Preemptive Rights”); and
WHEREAS, the Corporation and the Stockholders will materially benefit from the Series A Financing and the NQ Agreement and the Corporation accordingly desires to waive the Preemptive Rights.

RESOLVED, the Corporation hereby consents to the waiver by the Stockholders of the Preemptive Rights that arise solely out of or relate to the issuance of the Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing, and any shares of Common Stock issuable upon conversion of the Series A Preferred Stock, and of the NQ Shares, including the waiver of the related requirement for the delivery of notice of the Series A Financing and the issuance of the NQ Shares or the entrance into the NQ Agreement and any related notice or exercise period.
Interested Director Transaction
Whereas, it is hereby disclosed or made known to the Board that:

W, a director of the Corporation, is the founding partner of E Capital Fund II L.P., which has the right to purchase shares of Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing, and which is a party to a simple agreement for future equity with the Corporation that will convert into shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock in connection with the Series A Financing.
RESOLVED, that the transactions set forth above are hereby approved by the Board (including all directors other than the interested director set forth above).
EXHIBIT B
SERIES A PREFERRED STOCK PURCHASE AGREEMENT
[See attached.]
EXHIBIT H-2
TRANCHE 1 PLAN AMENDMENT
[See attached.]

risks.text: A INC.
ACTION BY WRITTEN CONSENT
OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS

Pursuant to the provisions of Section 141(f), 242 and 245 of the Delaware General Corporation Law (the “DGCL”), the undersigned, being all of the members of the Board of Directors (the “Board”) of A Inc., a Delaware corporation (the “Corporation”), hereby adopt the following resolutions by written consent in lieu of a meeting, effective as of the date first set forth above (the “Effective Date”).
Restated Certificate of Incorporation
FURTHER Resolved, that the Board recommends that the Stockholders approve and adopt the Restated Certificate.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, in the name and on behalf of the Corporation, to take all action deemed necessary or appropriate to solicit the consent of the Stockholders with respect to the foregoing Restated Certificate, and that any and all such actions that may have been taken to date are hereby authorized, ratified, approved and confirmed in all respects.

further resolved, that, upon receipt of the Stockholders’ consent, the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to make such filings with the Secretary of State of the State of Delaware as may be deemed necessary or appropriate with respect to the Restated Certificate.
Series A Preferred Stock Financing and Transaction Documents

WHEREAS, the Board deems it to be in the best interests of the Corporation and the Stockholders to issue and sell (the “Series A Financing”) (i) up to 1,551,865 shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-1 Shares”) at a purchase price of $1.6754 per share with respect to the conversion of the SAFEs (as defined below), (ii) up to 4,297,582 shares of Series A-2 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-2 Shares”) at the purchase price of $2.0942 per share, and (iii) up to 3,906,926 shares of Series A-3 Preferred Stock (the “Series A-3 Shares” and, collectively with the Series A-1 Shares and the Series A-2 Shares, the “Shares”) at a purchase price of $2.3036 per share, pursuant to the terms and conditions set forth in the Series A Preferred Stock Purchase Agreement, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit B (the “Purchase Agreement”); and

WHEREAS, in connection with the Series A Financing and the transactions contemplated by the Purchase Agreement, the Corporation proposes to (i) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Investors’ Rights Agreement, dated April 27, 2023 (the “IRA”), substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit C (the “Amended IRA”), (ii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Right of First Refusal and Co-Sale Agreement, dated April 7, 2025, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit D (the “Amended ROFR Agreement”), (iii) amend and restate the Corporation’s existing Voting Agreement, dated April 27, 2023, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit E (the “Amended Voting Agreement”), (iv) enter into certain Management Rights Letters, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit F (the “MRLs”), and (v) enter into Indemnification Agreements, substantially in the form attached hereto as Exhibit G (the “Indemnification Agreements” and, together with the Purchase Agreement, the Amended IRA, the Amended ROFR Agreement, the Amended Voting Agreement and the MRLs, the “Transaction Documents”).

FURTHER RESOLVED, that the officers of the Corporation are authorized in the name of and on behalf of the Corporation to execute and deliver the Transaction Documents and such other agreements and documents as such officers deem necessary and advisable in connection with the Series A Financing, the execution and delivery thereof to conclusively evidence approval by the Board.

further resolved, that the Shares issuable pursuant to the terms and conditions of the Purchase Agreement be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance pursuant to the terms of the Purchase Agreement, and that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to sell and issue the Shares for the consideration provided for in the Purchase Agreement and otherwise upon the terms and conditions described therein.

further resolved, that the issuance and delivery of the shares of Common Stock, issuable upon conversion of the Shares is hereby authorized and approved in all respects and that such shares of Common Stock (and any additional shares of Common Stock issuable upon conversion of any shares of Series A Preferred Stock issued upon operation of any anti-dilution or other adjustment provisions provided for under the Restated Certificate) be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance upon the conversion of the Shares.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that W and R will be the “Series A Preferred Directors” as that term is defined in the Restated Certificate.
Conversion and Termination of SAFEs

WHEREAS, pursuant to Section 1 of those certain simple agreements for future equity that the Corporation entered into between November 16, 2024 and April 12, 2025 (the “SAFEs”), upon the occurrence of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs), the SAFEs shall be converted into the preferred stock of the Corporation issued in the Equity Financing having identical rights, privileges, preferences and restrictions as such preferred stock; and

WHEREAS, the Series A Financing will satisfy the conditions of an Equity Financing (as defined in the SAFEs) and therefore, at the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing the SAFEs will automatically convert into shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock.

RESOLVED, that the Board approves the issuance of shares of Series A-1 Preferred Stock as required pursuant to the terms of the SAFEs, and confirms that the Series A Financing constitutes an Equity Financing pursuant to the SAFEs.

WHEREAS, on April 3, 2025, the Board approved and authorized the issuance by the Corporation of up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock (such shares, the “NQ Shares”) to NQ Clinic (“NQ”) (or its affiliate), pursuant to a Subscription Agreement with NQ and to that certain Know-How License Agreement with NQ Foundation for Medical Education and Research (collectively, the “NQ Agreement”), as partial consideration for the rights granted thereunder, and upon satisfaction of certain milestone events set forth therein.

RESOLVED, that the NQ Shares issuable pursuant to the terms and conditions of the NQ Agreement be, and they hereby are, reserved for issuance pursuant to the terms of the NQ Agreement, and that the officers of the Corporation are authorized and directed, for and on behalf of the Corporation, to issue the NQ Shares for the consideration provided for in the NQ Agreement and otherwise upon the terms and conditions described therein and herein.

further resolved, that upon the Initial Closing of the Series A Financing, 100,000 NQ Shares shall be issued to NQ, and such May Shares shall be duly and validly issued, fully-paid and nonassessable upon such issuance.

FURTHER RESOLVED, that it is desirable and in the best interests of the Corporation that its securities be exempt from registration in various states; that the Corporation’s officers are hereby authorized to determine the states in which appropriate action shall be taken to exempt the securities of the Corporation as such officers, or any of them individually, may deem advisable; that said officers are hereby authorized to perform on behalf of the Corporation any and all such acts as they deem necessary or advisable in order to comply with the applicable laws of any such states, and in connection therewith to execute and file all requisite papers and documents; and the execution by such officers of any such paper or document or the doing by them of any act in connection with the foregoing matters shall conclusively establish their authority from the Corporation and the approval and ratification by the Corporation of the papers and documents so executed and the action so taken.
Waiver of Preemptive Rights
WHEREAS, the Corporation is issuing shares of Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing and is issuing up to 300,000 shares of Common Stock pursuant to the NQ Agreement;
WHEREAS, the Corporation and the Stockholders will materially benefit from the Series A Financing and the NQ Agreement and the Corporation accordingly desires to waive the Preemptive Rights.

RESOLVED, the Corporation hereby consents to the waiver by the Stockholders of the Preemptive Rights that arise solely out of or relate to the issuance of the Series A Preferred Stock in the Series A Financing, and any shares of Common Stock issuable upon conversion of the Series A Preferred Stock, and of the NQ Shares, including the waiver of the related requirement for the delivery of notice of the Series A Financing and the issuance of the NQ Shares or the entrance into the NQ Agreement and any related notice or exercise period.
Interested Director Transaction

FURTHER RESOLVED, that all actions heretofore taken by the officers of the Corporation or any employee, agent, advisor or counsel of the Corporation in connection with any matter referred to or contemplated by any of the foregoing resolutions be, and they hereby are, adopted, approved, ratified and confirmed in all respects.
FURTHER RESOLVED, that this consent may be executed and delivered by facsimile or other electronic means, all of which shall be deemed to be originals, and all of which shall constitute one document.
[Signature page follow.]
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the undersigned, being all of the members of the Board of Directors of the Corporation, have executed this Action by Written Consent as of the Effective Date.
